check_summaries.description: Checks that functions/methods do not exceed line count thresholds
Checks efferent coupling: how many other functions each function calls

finding_groups.description: Functions calling more than 10.0 other functions

check_summaries.description: Checks afferent coupling: how many other functions call each function

finding_groups.description: Functions called by more than 10.0 other functions

check_summaries.description: Detects classes with too many methods, too much code, or too many outgoing dependencies

finding_groups.description: Classes exceeding god class criteria (methods, LOC, or fan-out)

check_summaries.description: Computes Martin's instability metric (I = Ce / (Ca + Ce)) per package

finding_groups.description: Packages with instability >= 0.8 that are depended on by others

check_summaries.description: Measures internal vs external edge ratio per component/cluster
Detects unused imports, variables, functions, and dead code via LSP diagnostics

finding_groups.description: Unused import statements that should be removed
